product_type: Track Light Kit for Four Post Track Lift

installation_requirements.installation_by: Only by experienced, factory authorized professionals

specifications.electrical_system: All electrical components are CSA or UL listed
specifications.system_controls: On-off electrical toggle switch located at post for light switching

features: Fluorescent track lighting for under-vehicle illumination
On-off electrical toggle switch located at post
All electrical components CSA or UL listed
Class I-Div 2 rated for garage-type environments
Limit switch kit blocks power when lift is below 18" from floor level
certifications: All electrical components CSA or UL listed
Meets or exceeds UL-201 and ANSI/ALI ALCTV-1998
safety_features: All light fixtures rated Class I-Div 2 for garage-type environments
Power to track lights blocked by limit switch kit when lift is below 18" from floor level
notes: Track light kit for use on a four post track lift
Quantities may vary with special length tracks and combinations of other options
Warranty: Five (5) years parts and labor for structural & mechanical; One (1) year parts and labor for electrical components and power unit
Sales, installation, training & service only by experienced, factory authorized professionals
